source_pr.title: executor: migrate test-infra to testify for part of testSuite

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select a from t order by a desc").Check(testkit.Rows("4", "3", "2", "1")) (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select a from t order by a desc").Check(testkit.Rows("4", "3", "2", "1")) (executor/executor_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: This PR migrates part of the executor test suite from legacy gocheck-style suites to testify. Framework migration can reduce flaky suite lifecycle / fixture issues by adopting modern `testing.T` + testify patterns.
fix_pattern: Migrate gocheck-based test suites to testify (modern Go `testing.T` patterns), updating suite setup/teardown and assertions.

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select a from t order by a desc").Check(testkit.Rows("4", "3", "2", "1")) (executor/executor_test.go)
